events.name: Radiant Wilds Launch (Apr 13)
events.desc: Major update LIVE TODAY. Full visual overhaul (lighting, water, textures, biomes). The Armory (data-driven build recommendations). 1v1 Arena PvP mode. New Crystal Arena map. Performance improvements for large-scale battles. Controller support upgrade ahead of Xbox launch Apr 21.
events.blog: Albion Online Radiant Wilds: Armory meta builds + 1v1 Arena strategy for competitive players

events.name: Post-Easter: State of Power cycle approaching
events.desc: Easter Egg Wonderland ended Apr 7. v1.30.14 live (Expert heroes Valeria & Ronne, Wild Brawl, separate troop camp tabs). State of Power (cross-state PvP) cycle approaching: Matchmaking Sat/Sun → 6-day Preparation Phase → Saturday Battle. Gen15 heroes (Hank, Estrella, Viveca) already live on Day 1080+ servers since v1.26.
events.blog: WoS State of Power prep: spending priorities + Expert hero Valeria evaluation for alliance leaders

events.name: 2026 Maple Syrup Festival (launched Apr 10)
events.desc: Active themed event with 5 daily package tiers. New General Isaac Brock available. Dragon Treasures mechanic. Spiritual Beast integration. V5.22.0 live with Glorious Attire cosmetic event + battlefield adjustments.
events.blog: Evony Maple Syrup Festival 2026: Isaac Brock evaluation + Dragon Treasures spending tiers

events.name: Expected: More Than Gems / Wheel of Fortune
events.desc: Historical pattern: MTG/WoF mid-April. Peak gem spending. Major whale decision point. March introduced Zenith of Power with Infantry skin (+20% Infantry Defense). Standard event rotation continues.
events.blog: RoK Wheel of Fortune April 2026: optimal spin strategy + gem budgeting for whales

events.name: Expected: SVS prep cycle
events.desc: SVS = highest spending event in SoS. Monthly recurring cross-state PvP with Preparation, Warfare, and Revival stages. Prep phase content has max impact.
events.blog: SoS SVS prep April 2026: diamond deployment strategy for alliance war leaders

events.name: Kingdom Clash + Hunt Battle (confirmed)
events.desc: Global launch Feb 26. Kingdom Clash (first cross-server event) active — entire kingdom vs matched server in week-long daily quest competition. Hunt Battle (new alliance event) confirmed — wave-based Blight clearing, 15 waves, R5/R4 initiation, 20+ members required. Easter Event just ended Apr 9. Zero creator coverage.
events.blog: Last Asylum: Plague Kingdom Clash + Hunt Battle — the only spending guide for serious players

events.name: Season 6 active — new content cycle
events.desc: Season 6 launched late March / early April 2026. Updated Apr 8-9. New season brings fresh meta, heroes, and spending events. Regular update cadence.
events.blog: Last War Season 6: what changed and where to spend first

events.name: Season 3 Copper Clash + Spring Expedition live
events.desc: Season III Copper Clash active — faction-based tile-capture battles, top 8 alliances, cross-alliance cooperation. Spring Expedition live with Spring Savory for exclusive spring skins. Reservoir: Glory Clash launched with Tier system + cross-State matching. Hero Talent Lvl 4 meta active.
events.blog: Tiles Survive Copper Clash: faction strategy + Spring Expedition rewards guide

events.name: Post-Anniversary: hero cycle + Sanctuary Battle
events.desc: 1st Anniversary Kingdom Festival ended Mar 24 (Night's Feast, Rock Party, Governor of Hope). Post-anniversary hero refresh cycle. New heroes drive summoning spending. Starry Expanse town skin now in circulation.
events.blog: King Shot post-anniversary: new hero tier list + what to spend on next

events.name: Xbox Series X|S Launch (Apr 21) — CONFIRMED
events.desc: Xbox launch Apr 21 with full PC/mobile crossplay and cross-progression. Major player influx expected. New UI navigation, dedicated controller scheme. Guild recruitment opportunity. Market disruption from new players. Radiant Wilds settling into meta.
events.blog: Albion Xbox launch Apr 21: what guild leaders need to know + market opportunity

events.name: Expected: KvK season prep / Lost Kingdom
events.desc: KvK = peak RoK spending. Prep content = highest search intent. Alliance coordination most valuable. Zenith of Power Infantry skin meta still evolving.
events.blog: RoK KvK prep 2026: complete spending priority list for alliance leaders

events.name: State of Power: Battle Phase weekend
events.desc: Cross-state PvP. Matchmaking on top 100 power + win rate. 6-day Prep → Saturday Battle. Top 50 = City Skin. Field Triage: 90% troops enter pool, recover 70% via Alliance Help/Tomes. Expert hero Valeria could shift Wild Brawl meta.
events.blog: WoS State of Power: alliance coordination + troop recovery strategy

events.name: Maple Syrup Festival (ending) + coin cleanup
events.desc: Event winding down ~Apr 24. Coin expiry imminent. Isaac Brock investment window closing. Dragon Treasures final pulls. Next themed event announcement expected.
events.blog: Evony Maple Syrup cleanup: coin priorities + Isaac Brock final evaluation

events.name: Hunt Battle alliance event active
events.desc: Hunt Battle wave-based clearing continues. Kingdom Clash cycling. First-mover content opportunity — zero mainstream creator coverage 7 weeks post-launch. Alliance coordination guides have no competition.
events.blog: Last Asylum Hunt Battle: wave-clear strategy + alliance coordination for R5/R4 leaders

events.name: Q2 Anniversary Season — peak spending
events.desc: Multiple games running anniversary / seasonal events. Biggest pack drops of the year. Cross-game budget = highest value content. Albion Xbox settling, WoS post-SoP, Evony new cycle, RoK KvK active.
events.blog: Best 4X events May 2026: where your money goes furthest across games

events.name: Post-Xbox Launch: market stabilization + Rites of Spring
events.desc: Xbox player influx one week in. Market prices adjusting. Guild recruitment at peak. Rites of Spring 2026 event confirmed. Keeper Event on roadmap. Territory meta adapting to Armory + new player influx.
events.blog: Albion post-Xbox launch: market guide + Rites of Spring strategy

events.name: Post-SoP recovery + Frost Star April rewards
events.desc: Post-State of Power recovery phase. Frost Star April top-up rewards active. Gen15 heroes (Hank, Estrella, Viveca) investment window for Day 1080+ servers. Expert hero Valeria comp optimization.

events.name: Season III ending → Season IV transition
